insights.title: Global Modulator Container must be placed above all consumers in the module tree
insights.summary: The GlobalModulatorContainer must appear before any module that uses a GlobalTimeVariantModulator in the HISE module tree (top-down processing order). Placing it below consumers results in silent modulation with no error.

insights.title: Sampler requires GlobalModulatorContainer to appear before it; other generators are more permissive
insights.summary: When driving a Sampler with a GlobalTimeVariantModulator, the GlobalModulatorContainer must strictly precede the Sampler in the chain. WavetableSynth and WaveformGenerator are less sensitive to ordering, but correct ordering is always required.

insights.title: Global LFO runs approximately 4x too fast in Scriptnode (clock-sync path)
insights.summary: Multiple trusted users confirmed that a tempo-synced Global LFO connected via the global_mod scriptnode node runs at roughly 4x the expected speed. A fix was pushed for the clock-synced path; the note-on sync hack was removed at the same time.
insights.verify_hint: grep clock sync LFO fix in GlobalModulators.cpp; check if note-on sync hack removal is present in calculateBlock

insights.title: Global modulators are not available in FX-plugin master chain by default
insights.summary: In FX plugin mode, GlobalTimeVariantModulators do not appear in the connection dropdown for effects placed in the master chain. A fix was added; enabling 'Sound Generator' in the FX plugin export settings and placing the GlobalModulatorContainer correctly resolves the issue.
insights.verify_hint: search for FX plugin global modulator dropdown visibility in GlobalModulatorEditor.h or GlobalModulators.cpp

insights.title: setNoteNumber() in MIDI scripts breaks global modulator lookup; use setTransposeAmount() instead
insights.summary: Global modulators identify events by note number and event ID. If a MIDI script calls setNoteNumber() to remap a note, the global modulator loses the event association and ignores that note. setTransposeAmount() preserves the original note number and avoids this problem.
insights.verify_hint: grep getEventIdForNoteNumber or event lookup in GlobalModulators.cpp

insights.title: Envelopes cannot be placed inside a GlobalModulatorContainer
insights.summary: Envelope modulators extend voice lifetime, which conflicts with the global modulation system's voice management. Only TimeVariantModulators (LFO, etc.) are permitted as sources inside the container.

insights.title: Use a global cable and callback to read the current modulator value from script
insights.summary: Polling a GlobalTimeVariantModulator's output value from HiseScript is not supported directly. The recommended approach is to attach a GlobalCable to the modulator and register a callback, which moves the polling to the C++ side and supports both synchronous and async execution.

insights.title: Table popup label shows 'Not assigned' inside a global modulator
insights.summary: When a TableEditor control is connected to a GlobalTimeVariantModulator's table via the processor ID dropdown, the table's y-axis popup label displays 'Not assigned' because the global modulator has no fixed modulation target. Use setTablePopupFunction() to provide a custom label.

insights.title: Use setTablePopupFunction() to provide a meaningful table popup label
insights.summary: Call Table.setTablePopupFunction(function(x, y) { return ... }) on the global modulator's table reference to replace the default 'Not assigned' y-axis label with a percentage or other context-appropriate string.

insights.title: Build free-running LFO in scriptnode to avoid note-on dependency
insights.summary: A GlobalTimeVariantModulator wrapping an LFO will restart on each note-on. For a free-running LFO that does not retrigger, implement the oscillator as a scriptnode network inside a Script FX module instead.

insights.title: Using GlobalModulator with global_mod scriptnode node can crash HISE on quit
insights.summary: A crash-on-quit was reported when combining a GlobalModulator with a global_mod scriptnode node. The issue was filed but not confirmed resolved at time of reporting.
insights.verify_hint: check GlobalModulator teardown in GlobalModulators.cpp and global_mod node destructor in scriptnode

insights.title: Multiple GlobalModulatorContainers are possible but not fully supported; place private container second
insights.summary: HISE supports adding a second GlobalModulatorContainer for 'private' modulators that should not appear in the mod matrix. However, the system was not designed for this: internal code uses getFirstModulatorContainer(), so always place the private container second to avoid unexpected behaviour.
insights.verify_hint: grep getFirstModulatorContainer in HISE source to identify affected call sites
